title: Bearer token authentication middleware
description: Implement Tower middleware (or axum extractor) that validates Bearer tokens on protected endpoints. Extracts Authorization header, hashes the token with SHA-256, looks up in oauth_tokens, checks revoked_at is null, returns account_id and scopes. Unauthorized requests to protected endpoints return 401 with {"error": "The access token is invalid"}.
design: Axum extractor AuthUser that returns (account_id, scopes). Scope checking per endpoint (read scope for GETs, write scope for POSTs). Use axum::extract::TypedHeader for Authorization header. Update last_used_at with a non-blocking fire-and-forget update.
acceptance_criteria: Protected endpoint with valid token returns data; invalid token returns 401 JSON; expired/revoked token returns 401; missing token returns 401; token last_used_at is updated on use
